headline: Port of Toledo pursues new warehouse and liquid bulk terminal
paragraphs: The Toledo-Lucas County Port Authority is pursuing a new warehouse and liquid bulk terminal to expand cargo handling capacity, per The Blade (April 13).
why_it_matters: Slower-moving than retail news, but the strongest indicator of industrial-side capacity. A liquid terminal signals long-term industrial demand confidence and may anchor downstream logistics jobs.
search_terms: Toledo Port Authority warehouse liquid bulk terminal cargo
